description: Single source of truth for the python-test job pytest target set, ignore/deselect contract, and xdist parallelization knobs. Consumed by both the pytest execution step in .github/workflows/ci.yml and the ci_test_selection/v1 artifact generator (generate_ci_test_selection_artifact.py) via the scripts/ci/python_test_plan.py loader. Edit this file (not the workflow or the generator) to change the python-test target set.

notes.parallel_exclude_rationale: Tests listed here are collected into the ci_test_selection scope (full coverage) but are excluded from the xdist parallel run and executed in a dedicated serial (-n 0) lane instead. test_session_manifest_debounce.py drives a real debounce front-gate with an 80ms window; under xdist CPU saturation the window expires between burst invocations and the coalescing assertion flakes (Issue #1064). It is tmp_path-isolated (not a shared-fixture/cwd race), so a serial lane restores determinism without changing the test.
notes.schemas_tests_inclusion: schemas/tests/ is included exactly once here; it was previously missing from the generator pytest_args, causing the executed target set and the ci_test_selection artifact to drift (Issue #1064).
notes.dedicated_lanes_excluded: tests/codex/test_local_main_branch_guard.py runs in its own codex execpolicy step (needs the pinned codex CLI context) and is intentionally NOT in targets to avoid double execution. The Node-backed lane (pnpm test / e2e) and the hook-discovery collect-only guard remain separate steps; this plan only governs the unified python pytest suite.
notes.ignore_deselect_contract: ignore/deselect preserve the hook-discovery contract: test_secret_boundary_contract.py is ignored (tracked by #412) and the two non-hermetic generate_session_manifest wrapper tests are deselected.
